subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the Wronged One unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, that he may rejoice in the remembrance of God and arise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم الی الذی آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم لیفرح بذکر الله و یقوم
subcodes.subjects: @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
